name: Homemade Chicken Noodle Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Add chicken, celery, onion, and seasoning to the stock.
2. Bring to a boil.
3. Add noodles. Cover and cook until noodles are almost tender (5 to 10 minutes).
4. Mix flour with a small amount of milk until smooth. Add remaining milk. Stir into soup.
5. Cook until desired thickness is reached.
